description: Sells ATM straddles (or strangles) when implied volatility is elevated relative to historical volatility, exploiting IV's tendency to revert to its mean. IV Rank is proxied as IV/HV; a ratio above 7 triggers premium-selling entries. Also buys an ATM call when IV is above 6 but not yet in the premium-selling zone, capturing directional upside before IV falls below 6. Exits on IV compression, a time stop at 21 DTE, or a stop-loss if IV expands further.

IV_RANK_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum IV/HV ratio required to open a premium-selling position. Spec mandates 7.

IV_RANK_EXTREME.description: IV/HV ratio above which position is scaled up with additional OTM short strikes.

STRANGLE_OFFSET.description: Strike offset from spot for entry. 0 = ATM straddle; positive value = OTM strangle.

IV_RANK_EXIT.description: Profit-take threshold: close position when IV/HV ratio compresses below this level.

STOP_LOSS_RATIO.description: Stop-loss threshold: close position when IV/HV ratio expands above this level.

EXIT_DTE.description: Time-based exit: close entire position when days-to-expiry are at or below this value.

IV_CALL_THRESHOLD.description: Buy-call threshold: a BUY_CALL signal is generated when IV is still above this level (IV > 6) and the IV/HV ratio is not yet in the premium-selling zone, allowing entry into a long call before IV falls below 6 and premiums collapse.
